diagrams.title: Cartesian Product P2 □ P3
diagrams.description: Shows a 2×3 grid graph formed by Cartesian product of paths
diagrams.purpose: Visualize Cartesian product adjacency: change exactly one coordinate

diagrams.title: Tensor Product K2 × K3
diagrams.description: Shows complete bipartite graph K_{2,3} formed by tensor product
elements: Edges only when BOTH conditions satisfied
diagrams.purpose: Understand tensor product requires adjacency in BOTH graphs simultaneously

diagrams.title: Join Operation K1 + C4
diagrams.description: Shows wheel graph W5 formed by join of single vertex and cycle
elements: Center vertex connected to all 4 cycle vertices
diagrams.purpose: Visualize join creates all cross-edges between two graphs

diagrams.title: Graph Complement Process
diagrams.description: Shows original graph and its complement side by side
elements: Complement: flip edges to non-edges and vice versa
diagrams.purpose: Understand complement operation completely inverts adjacency relation

diagrams.title: Isomorphic Graphs C6 and Prism
diagrams.description: Two visually different but structurally identical graphs
elements: C6: 6 vertices in a single cycle
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate isomorphism preserves structure not visual representation
